basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad has released the official notification for 1 ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidate as per GoI rule.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering or in allied fields (GATE qualified), M.Tech in Thermofluidic Sciences or allied fields (desirable), Prior experience of microfluidics experiments or multiphase flow simulations using OpenFOAM (desirable)
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering or in allied fields. Candidate must be GATE qualified. Candidates awaiting their result for M.Tech. (must be GATE qualified) degree are also eligible to apply. Prior experience of microfluidics experiments or multiphase flow simulations using OpenFOAM is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000/- for the first 2 years and Rs. 42000/- pm for the 3rd year.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
